description: Brand mark specimen: shows a <brand-mark> on light/dark surfaces, a size scale, and a clear-space box

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Logo image URL, passed through to each <brand-mark src>

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Brand name, passed through to each <brand-mark wordmark> (default: "Brand")

attributes.name: data-sizes
attributes.description: Space-separated <brand-mark data-size> values for the scale row (default: "s m l xl")
